entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A serious problem and environmental condition characterized by rainfall deficiencies that affects people and ecosystems

entities.name: DESERTIFICATION
entities.description: A serious environmental problem involving the degradation of land in arid, semi-arid, and dry sub-humid areas

entities.name: RURAL FARM FAMILIES
entities.description: The primary target group and stakeholders who are vulnerable to drought and manage Rural Knowledge Centres

entities.name: CRISIS MANAGEMENT APPROACH
entities.description: A routinely followed approach for providing relief after a drought occurs

entities.name: DROUGHT PREPAREDNESS
entities.description: A proactive strategy and state of readiness to mitigate the effects of drought, considered superior to relief

entities.name: MICRO-LEVEL DROUGHT ASSESSMENT
entities.description: A technique used to evaluate drought conditions at a granular, local level

entities.name: EARLY WARNING TECHNIQUE
entities.description: A method used to provide advance notice of impending drought to enable preparedness

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL INFORMATION MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The practice of managing international, national, and extra-institutional sources of agricultural information

entities.name: INFORMATION AND COMMUNICATION TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: Tools and systems used to enable Rural Knowledge Centres and facilitate information flow

entities.name: RURAL KNOWLEDGE CENTRES
entities.description: ICT-enabled intermediary entities owned and run by rural farm families to support drought preparedness

entities.name: OPEN AND DISTANCE LEARNING METHODS
entities.description: Educational approaches used to disseminate knowledge as part of the drought preparedness framework

entities.name: MICRO-LEVEL DROUGHT PREPAREDNESS FRAMEWORK
entities.description: A proposed integrated system combining ICT tools, information management, and assessment techniques to support rural farm families

entities.name: VULNERABILITY
entities.description: The susceptibility of societies and rural families to the negative impacts of drought

relationships.description: helps rural families estimate and manage
